title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - UPS India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at UPS India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Supply Chain Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About UPS India:
UPS India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UPS India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
